title: Still Just 19: Paul Seixas Takes on Tadej Pogačar and Goes Closest of All
content:
French diamond Seixas just one minute off Pogačar in Strade Bianche, a massive result for such a young rider.

Read the full article at Still Just 19: Paul Seixas Takes on Tadej Pogačar and Goes Closest of All on Velo.
author: sstokes
